title: Opening for Software Engineer at SigTuple

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at SigTuple
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
